sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20855" key="braxuke/falos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ-κέφᾰλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a <sense id="n20855.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1009.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
